# Mote Kreatif

> Mote Kreatif (PT Masyarakat Modal Tekun) adalah digital marketing agency dan consultant berbasis di Garut, Jawa Barat, Indonesia. Didirikan 2024. Membantu brand lokal Indonesia scale penjualan lewat Meta Ads, CPAS Shopee, TikTok Shop Ads, marketplace optimization, dan pengembangan tim marketing internal (TDMO).

Mote Kreatif melayani klien di Garut, Jawa Barat, dan seluruh Indonesia. Hasil terukur: ROAS 20.8x (Hanoon Industries, CPAS Shopee), omset +77% (Rancabango Hotel & Resort), leads +300% (Popondok). 20+ klien dilayani, 50+ project selesai.

## Layanan

- [Digital Marketing Full](https://motekreatif.com/services): Strategi end-to-end — Meta Ads, Google Ads, marketplace optimization, content strategy, analytics
- [Social Media & Marketplace Optimization](https://motekreatif.com/services): Instagram, TikTok, Shopee, TikTok Shop — organik + paid terintegrasi
- [TDMO — Team Development & Marketing Optimization](https://motekreatif.com/tdmo): Program kemitraan 6 bulan membangun tim marketing internal sampai mandiri
- [Brand Growth](https://motekreatif.com/services): Brand identity, positioning, strategi pertumbuhan jangka panjang
- [Campaign Activation](https://motekreatif.com/services): Product launch, seasonal campaign, KOL collaboration, event activation

## Produk Digital

- [Mote Blaster](https://blaster.motekreatif.com): WhatsApp CRM SaaS — chat recording, broadcast, AI agent
- [Modal Tekun](https://mt.motekreatif.com): PWA keuangan pribadi & keluarga, sync Google Sheets
- [Klir](https://klir.motekreatif.com): Akuntansi simple untuk UMKM — pembukuan & laporan otomatis

## Halaman Utama

- [Tentang Kami](https://motekreatif.com/about): Filosofi, visi misi, lokasi kantor
- [Case Studies](https://motekreatif.com/case-studies): Hasil terukur untuk klien hotel, F&B, fashion, glamping
- [Kontak](https://motekreatif.com/contact): WhatsApp +62 896-6215-8784, email motekreatif@gmail.com

- MOTE Office — HOP Space: Jl. Raya Cipanas No.13, Cimanganten, Tarogong Kaler, Garut, Jawa Barat 44151
